title: DRW MD-DRW-527: Inrush & Fuse Assembly
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-527 Rev B — Inrush & Fuse Assembly

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1072, P-1073, P-1074, P-1082.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Lena Okafor, approved by Felix Herrera.
